overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a forest path during golden hour. The character travels from a dense wooded area with stone ruins through a sunlit clearing and into a marshy wetland, eventually stopping near an abandoned cart.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow forest path with two swords strapped to back, passing stone ruins on the right

entered.detail: weathered stone wall covered in moss and vegetation, partially collapsed
dense forest of tall pine trees creating canopy overhead
dense forest of tall pine trees with sunlight filtering through
narrow winding dirt path through the forest with patches of grass
small boulders and rocks along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow forest trail enclosed by dense pine trees. A weathered stone ruin wall runs along the right side while the path winds forward. The lighting is warm and backlit from the setting sun ahead, creating long shadows across the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest clearing transitioning to open marsh

events.description: emerging from dense tree cover into direct golden sunlight, causing lens flare
ground surface transitions from packed dirt to dry cracked earth and marshy terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the bright sun, moving from enclosed forest to open clearing

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a wide clearing with the sun now directly visible and creating intense golden light. The stone wall falls behind as the path widens and the trees recede into the distance. The ground begins to show cracks and patches of marsh grass as the terrain transitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshy wetland with abandoned cart and distant ruins

events.description: abandoned wooden cart comes into view on the right side of the path
character stops walking and turns to survey the marshy surroundings

agents.ego_description: approaching an abandoned cart in a misty marsh, then stopping and turning to observe the area

entered.detail: weathered wooden cart with broken wheels, partially submerged in mud
shallow pools of water reflecting the sunset in the marshy ground
ruined stone tower or building visible through the haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path becomes a cracked marshy wetland with pools of water reflecting the golden sunset. An abandoned wooden cart sits partially submerged in the mud ahead. The character approaches the cart, stops, and turns to survey the misty surroundings with a distant stone ruin visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded forest trail that gradually opens into a wide, sun-drenched marshland. It begins on a narrow dirt path enclosed by dense pine trees and a weathered stone ruin wall, with the setting sun casting long shadows ahead. As the camera moves forward, the forest recedes and the scene expands into a wide clearing where the intense golden light of the visible sun floods the landscape. The terrain then shifts from dry earth to a cracked wetland filled with reflective pools of water, leading the camera toward a partially submerged abandoned wooden cart. Finally, the movement comes to a halt as the character turns to survey the misty surroundings and a distant stone ruin on the horizon.
